# MDE v1.3.14

## Features

* Added a public VitePress user manual under `user-manual/` with Chinese guidance for opening workspaces, navigating files, editing Markdown, searching, using links, AI summary/translation, settings, and troubleshooting.
* Added automated manual screenshots generated from real Electron E2E flows so the published manual reflects the current desktop UI.
* Added a GitHub Pages workflow to publish the user manual from `master`.

## Bug Fixes

* Added regression coverage for the editor history button toggling the recovery/history panel while previewing a deleted document.

## Breaking Changes

* None.

## Maintenance

* Added `docs:screenshots`, `docs:build`, `docs:dev`, and `docs:preview` scripts for the user manual workflow.
* Updated project and release guidance so user-facing changes require user manual updates before release.
* Updated ESLint and TypeScript configuration to include the VitePress config while ignoring generated VitePress build output.
* Added npm overrides for `uuid@14.0.0` and project-level `vite@6.4.2`, clearing npm audit findings across production and development dependencies.
* Increased Vitest timeouts for slow interaction-heavy unit suites so local and pre-push verification use the same stable threshold.

## Documentation

* Added README instructions for building, previewing, and refreshing the public user manual.
* Updated the release skill to include user manual verification and GitHub Pages checks.

## Verification

* `npm run docs:screenshots`
* `npm run docs:build`
* `npm run typecheck`
* `npm run lint`
* `npm run test:unit`
* `npm run test:integration`
* `npm run test:e2e`
* `npm audit`

## Artifacts

* GitHub Actions will build and publish macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS installer/update metadata for this tag.
* GitHub Pages will publish the user manual when the Deploy User Manual workflow completes.
